de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt

Class SpecificationRepository

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt.SpecificationRepository

  • public final class SpecificationRepository
extends java.lang.Object
    Central storage for all specification elements, such as contracts, class axioms, and loop invariants. Provides methods for adding such elements to the repository, and for retrieving them afterwards.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static java.lang.String CONTRACT_COMBINATION_MARKER 
      static java.lang.String LIMIT_SUFFIX

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addBlockContract(BlockContract contract)
      Adds a new BlockContract and a new FunctionalBlockContract to the repository.
      void addBlockContract(BlockContract contract, boolean addFunctionalContract)
      Adds a new BlockContract to the repository.
      void addClassAxiom(ClassAxiom ax)
      Registers the passed class axiom.
      void addClassAxioms(ImmutableSet<ClassAxiom> toAdd)
      Registers the passed class axioms.
      void addClassInvariant(ClassInvariant inv)
      Registers the passed class invariant, and inherits it to all subclasses if it is public or protected.
      void addClassInvariants(ImmutableSet<ClassInvariant> toAdd)
      Registers the passed class invariants.
      void addContract(Contract contract)
      Registers the passed (atomic) contract, and inherits it to all overriding methods.
      void addContractNoInheritance(Contract contract)
      Registers the passed (atomic) contract without inheriting it.
      void addContracts(ImmutableSet<Contract> toAdd)
      Registers the passed contracts.
      void addInitiallyClause(InitiallyClause ini)
      Registers the passed initially clause.
      void addInitiallyClauses(ImmutableSet<InitiallyClause> toAdd)
      Registers the passed initially clauses.
      void addLoopContract(LoopContract contract)
      Adds a new LoopContract and a new FunctionalLoopContract to the repository.
      void addLoopContract(LoopContract contract, boolean addFunctionalContract)
      Adds a new LoopContract to the repository.
      void addLoopInvariant(LoopSpecification inv)
      Registers the passed loop invariant, possibly overwriting an older registration for the same loop.
      void addMergeContract(MergeContract mc)
      Registers a MergeContract.
      void addRepresentsTermToWdChecksForModelFields(KeYJavaType kjt)
      Represent terms belong to model fields, so the well-definedness check considers both of them together.
      void addSpecs(ImmutableSet<SpecificationElement> specs) 
      void addWdStatement(StatementWellDefinedness swd)
      Registers a well-definedness check for a jml statement.
      FunctionalOperationContract combineOperationContracts(ImmutableSet<FunctionalOperationContract> toCombine)
      Creates a combined contract out of the passed atomic contracts.
      void copyLoopInvariant(LoopStatement from, LoopStatement to)
      Copies a loop invariant from a loop statement to another.
      void createContractsFromInitiallyClauses()
      Adds postconditions raising from initially clauses to all constructors.
      ImmutableSet<Contract> getAllContracts()
      Returns all registered contracts.
      ImmutableSet<Proof> getAllProofs()
      Returns all proofs registered with this specification repository.
      ImmutableSet<WellDefinednessCheck> getAllWdChecks()
      Returns all registered well-definedness checks.
      ImmutableSet<BlockContract> getBlockContracts(StatementBlock block)
      Returns all block contracts for the specified block.
      ImmutableSet<BlockContract> getBlockContracts(StatementBlock block, Modality modality)
      Returns block contracts for according block statement and modality.
      ImmutableSet<ClassAxiom> getClassAxioms(KeYJavaType selfKjt)
      Returns all class axioms visible in the passed class, including the axioms induced by invariant declarations.
      ImmutableSet<ClassInvariant> getClassInvariants(KeYJavaType kjt)
      Returns all known class invariants for the passed type.
      Contract getContractByName(java.lang.String name)
      Returns the registered (atomic or combined) contract corresponding to the passed name, or null.
      ContractPO getContractPOForProof(Proof proof)
      Returns the PO that the passed proof is about, or null.
      ImmutableSet<Contract> getContracts(KeYJavaType kjt, IObserverFunction target)
      Returns all registered (atomic) contracts for the passed target.
      ImmutableSet<IObserverFunction> getContractTargets(KeYJavaType kjt)
      Returns all functions for which contracts are registered in the passed type.
      ImmutableSet<Contract> getInheritedContracts(Contract contract)
      Returns a set encompassing the passed contract and all its versions inherited to overriding methods.
      ImmutableSet<Contract> getInheritedContracts(ImmutableSet<Contract> contractSet)
      Returns a set encompassing the passed contracts and all its versions inherited to overriding methods.
      ImmutableSet<LoopContract> getLoopContracts(LoopStatement loop)
      Returns all loop contracts for the specified loop.
      ImmutableSet<LoopContract> getLoopContracts(LoopStatement loop, Modality modality)
      Returns loop contracts for according loop statement and modality.
      ImmutableSet<LoopContract> getLoopContracts(StatementBlock block)
      Returns all loop contracts for the specified block.
      ImmutableSet<LoopContract> getLoopContracts(StatementBlock block, Modality modality) 
      LoopSpecification getLoopSpec(LoopStatement loop)
      Returns the registered loop invariant for the passed loop, or null.
      ImmutableSet<MergeContract> getMergeContracts(MergePointStatement mps) 
      ImmutableSet<FunctionalOperationContract> getOperationContracts(KeYJavaType kjt, IProgramMethod pm)
      Returns all registered (atomic) operation contracts for the passed operation.
      ImmutableSet<FunctionalOperationContract> getOperationContracts(KeYJavaType kjt, IProgramMethod pm, Modality modality)
      Returns all registered (atomic) operation contracts for the passed operation which refer to the passed modality.
      ImmutableSet<Pair<KeYJavaType,IObserverFunction>> getOverridingTargets(KeYJavaType kjt, IObserverFunction target) 
      ContractPO getPO(Contract c)
      Returns the PO that the passed contract is about, or null.
      ContractPO getPOForProof(Proof proof) 
      ProofOblInput getProofOblInput(Proof proof)
      Returns the ProofOblInput from which the given Proof was created.
      ImmutableSet<Proof> getProofs(Contract atomicContract)
      Returns all proofs registered for the passed atomic contract, or for combined contracts including the passed atomic contract
      ImmutableSet<Proof> getProofs(KeYJavaType kjt, IObserverFunction target)
      Returns all proofs registered for the passed target and its overriding targets.
      ImmutableSet<Proof> getProofs(ProofOblInput po)
      Returns all proofs registered for the passed PO (or stronger POs).
      IObserverFunction getTargetOfProof(Proof proof)
      Returns the target that the passed proof is about, or null.
      Pair<IObserverFunction,ImmutableSet<Taclet>> limitObs(IObserverFunction obs) 
      void map(java.util.function.UnaryOperator<Term> op, Services services)
      Applies the specified operator to every contract in this repository.
      void registerProof(ProofOblInput po, Proof proof)
      Registers the passed proof.
      void removeBlockContract(BlockContract contract)
      Removes a BlockContract from the repository.
      void removeLoopContract(LoopContract contract)
      Removes a LoopContract from the repository.
      void removeMergeContracts(MergePointStatement mps)
      Deletes the MergeContracts for a given MergePointStatement.
      void removeProof(Proof proof)
      Unregisters the passed proof.

      Splits the passed contract into its atomic components.

    • Method Detail

      • getOverridingTargets

        public ImmutableSet<Pair<KeYJavaType,IObserverFunction>> getOverridingTargets(KeYJavaType kjt,
                                                                              IObserverFunction target)

      • getClassInvariants

        public ImmutableSet<ClassInvariant> getClassInvariants(KeYJavaType kjt)

        Returns all known class invariants for the passed type.

        This method is used by Visual DbC and has to be public.

      • map

        public void map(java.util.function.UnaryOperator<Term> op,
                Services services)
        Applies the specified operator to every contract in this repository.
        Parameters:
        op - an operator.
        services - services.
        See Also:
        SpecificationElement.map(java.util.function.UnaryOperator, Services)

        public ImmutableSet<Contract> getAllContracts()
        Returns all registered contracts.

        public ImmutableSet<Contract> getContracts(KeYJavaType kjt,

        Returns all registered (atomic) contracts for the passed target.

                                                                       IProgramMethod pm)
        Returns all registered (atomic) operation contracts for the passed operation.

      • getOperationContracts

        public ImmutableSet<FunctionalOperationContract> getOperationContracts(KeYJavaType kjt,
                                                                       IProgramMethod pm,
                                                                       Modality modality)
        Returns all registered (atomic) operation contracts for the passed operation which refer to the passed modality.

        public Contract getContractByName(java.lang.String name)
        Returns the registered (atomic or combined) contract corresponding to the passed name, or null.

        public ImmutableSet<Contract> getInheritedContracts(Contract contract)
        Returns a set encompassing the passed contract and all its versions inherited to overriding methods.

        Returns a set encompassing the passed contracts and all its versions inherited to overriding methods.

        Returns all functions for which contracts are registered in the passed type.

        Registers the passed (atomic) contract without inheriting it.

        Registers the passed contracts.

        Splits the passed contract into its atomic components.

      • addClassInvariant

        public void addClassInvariant(ClassInvariant inv)
        Registers the passed class invariant, and inherits it to all subclasses if it is public or protected.

      • addClassInvariants

        public void addClassInvariants(ImmutableSet<ClassInvariant> toAdd)
        Registers the passed class invariants.

      • createContractsFromInitiallyClauses

        public void createContractsFromInitiallyClauses()
                                         throws SLTranslationException
        Adds postconditions raising from initially clauses to all constructors. Warning: To be called after all contracts have been registered.
        Throws:
        SLTranslationException - may be thrown during contract extraction

      • addInitiallyClause

        public void addInitiallyClause(InitiallyClause ini)
        Registers the passed initially clause. Initially clauses in JML specify the post-state of any constructor of subtypes; they may particularly be used in interface types. To create proof obligations from initially clauses, the method createContractsFromInitiallyClauses adds them to the contracts of respective constructors (or adds a contract if there is none yet).
        Parameters:
        ini - initially clause

      • addInitiallyClauses

        public void addInitiallyClauses(ImmutableSet<InitiallyClause> toAdd)
        Registers the passed initially clauses.

      • getClassAxioms

        public ImmutableSet<ClassAxiom> getClassAxioms(KeYJavaType selfKjt)
        Returns all class axioms visible in the passed class, including the axioms induced by invariant declarations.

      • addClassAxiom

        public void addClassAxiom(ClassAxiom ax)
        Registers the passed class axiom.

      • addClassAxioms

        public void addClassAxioms(ImmutableSet<ClassAxiom> toAdd)
        Registers the passed class axioms.

      • getProofs

        public ImmutableSet<Proof> getProofs(ProofOblInput po)
        Returns all proofs registered for the passed PO (or stronger POs).

      • getProofs

        public ImmutableSet<Proof> getProofs(Contract atomicContract)
        Returns all proofs registered for the passed atomic contract, or for combined contracts including the passed atomic contract

      • getProofs

        public ImmutableSet<Proof> getProofs(KeYJavaType kjt,
                                     IObserverFunction target)
        Returns all proofs registered for the passed target and its overriding targets.

      • getAllProofs

        public ImmutableSet<Proof> getAllProofs()
        Returns all proofs registered with this specification repository.

        Returns the PO that the passed proof is about, or null.

        Returns the PO that the passed contract is about, or null.

        public ContractPO getPOForProof(Proof proof)

      • getProofOblInput

        public ProofOblInput getProofOblInput(Proof proof)
        Returns the ProofOblInput from which the given Proof was created.
        Parameters:
        proof - The Proof.
        Returns:
        The ProofOblInput of the given Proof or null if not available.

      • getTargetOfProof

        public IObserverFunction getTargetOfProof(Proof proof)
        Returns the target that the passed proof is about, or null.

      • registerProof

        public void registerProof(ProofOblInput po,
                          Proof proof)
        Registers the passed proof.

      • removeProof

        public void removeProof(Proof proof)
        Unregisters the passed proof.

      • getLoopSpec

        public LoopSpecification getLoopSpec(LoopStatement loop)
        Returns the registered loop invariant for the passed loop, or null.

      • copyLoopInvariant

        public void copyLoopInvariant(LoopStatement from,
                              LoopStatement to)
        Copies a loop invariant from a loop statement to another. If the original loop does not possess an invariant, none is set to the target. A possibly existing old registration will be overwritten, a registration for the original loop remains untouched.
        Parameters:
        from - the loop with the original contract
        loop - the loop for which the contract is to be copied

      • addLoopInvariant

        public void addLoopInvariant(LoopSpecification inv)
        Registers the passed loop invariant, possibly overwriting an older registration for the same loop.

      • getBlockContracts

        public ImmutableSet<BlockContract> getBlockContracts(StatementBlock block)
        Returns all block contracts for the specified block.
        Parameters:
        block - a block.
        Returns:
        all block contracts for the specified block.

      • getLoopContracts

        public ImmutableSet<LoopContract> getLoopContracts(StatementBlock block)
        Returns all loop contracts for the specified block.
        Parameters:
        block - a block.
        Returns:
        all loop contracts for the specified block.

      • getLoopContracts

        public ImmutableSet<LoopContract> getLoopContracts(LoopStatement loop)
        Returns all loop contracts for the specified loop.
        Parameters:
        loop - a loop.
        Returns:
        all loop contracts for the specified loop.

        public ImmutableSet<MergeContract> getMergeContracts(MergePointStatement mps)

      • getBlockContracts

        public ImmutableSet<BlockContract> getBlockContracts(StatementBlock block,
                                                     Modality modality)
        Returns block contracts for according block statement and modality.
        Parameters:
        block - the given block.
        modality - the given modality.
        Returns:

      • getLoopContracts

        public ImmutableSet<LoopContract> getLoopContracts(StatementBlock block,
                                                   Modality modality)

      • getLoopContracts

        public ImmutableSet<LoopContract> getLoopContracts(LoopStatement loop,
                                                   Modality modality)
        Returns loop contracts for according loop statement and modality.
        Parameters:
        loop - the given loop.
        modality - the given modality.
        Returns:
        the set of resulting loop statements.

      • addBlockContract

        public void addBlockContract(BlockContract contract)
        Adds a new BlockContract and a new FunctionalBlockContract to the repository.
        Parameters:
        contract - the BlockContract to add.

      • addBlockContract

        public void addBlockContract(BlockContract contract,
                             boolean addFunctionalContract)
        Adds a new BlockContract to the repository.
        Parameters:
        contract - the BlockContract to add.
        addFunctionalContract - whether or not to add a new FunctionalBlockContract based on contract.

      • removeBlockContract

        public void removeBlockContract(BlockContract contract)

        Removes a BlockContract from the repository.

        The associated FunctionalBlockContract is not removed.

        Parameters:
        contract - the BlockContract to remove.

      • addLoopContract

        public void addLoopContract(LoopContract contract)
        Adds a new LoopContract and a new FunctionalLoopContract to the repository.
        Parameters:
        contract - the LoopContract to add.

      • addLoopContract

        public void addLoopContract(LoopContract contract,
                            boolean addFunctionalContract)
        Adds a new LoopContract to the repository.
        Parameters:
        contract - the LoopContract to add.
        addFunctionalContract - whether or not to add a new FunctionalLoopContract based on contract.

      • removeLoopContract

        public void removeLoopContract(LoopContract contract)

        Removes a LoopContract from the repository.

        The associated FunctionalLoopContract is not removed.

        Parameters:
        contract - the LoopContract to remove.

      • addMergeContract

        public void addMergeContract(MergeContract mc)
        Registers a MergeContract.
        Parameters:
        mc - The MergeContract to register.

      • removeMergeContracts

        public void removeMergeContracts(MergePointStatement mps)
        Deletes the MergeContracts for a given MergePointStatement.
        Parameters:
        mps - The MergePointStatement to delete the registered contracts for.

      • addSpecs

        public void addSpecs(ImmutableSet<SpecificationElement> specs)

      • limitObs

        public Pair<IObserverFunction,ImmutableSet<Taclet>> limitObs(IObserverFunction obs)

      • unlimitObs

        public IObserverFunction unlimitObs(IObserverFunction obs)

      • addRepresentsTermToWdChecksForModelFields

        public void addRepresentsTermToWdChecksForModelFields(KeYJavaType kjt)
        Represent terms belong to model fields, so the well-definedness check considers both of them together.
        Parameters:
        kjt - The relevant KeYJavaType

      • addWdStatement

        public void addWdStatement(StatementWellDefinedness swd)
        Registers a well-definedness check for a jml statement. It does not take care of its visibility in the proof management dialog.
        Parameters:
        swd - The well-definedness check

      • getAllWdChecks

        public ImmutableSet<WellDefinednessCheck> getAllWdChecks()
        Returns all registered well-definedness checks.
